summary: Recording details are unclear; the lone review is a statistical note on Jack Straw rather than an assessment of performance or sound.
review: The single fan comment provides an interesting fact about how often Jack Straw appears in setlists but offers no insight into the musical execution or audio quality of this recording. Consequently, there is insufficient information to evaluate either the show’s artistry or the technical fidelity of the tape.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review with a 4‑star rating and no substantive comments on performance or recording; rating reflects limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments regarding sound quality, mix, or source type.
